creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Sevan, hi Thomas,

there is a problem with the mysql dependencies here (see the relevant part
of a build log below). The port should probably set USE_MYSQL instead of
an explicit dependency on databases/mysql50-server.

Could someone of you please investigate and send an updated patch?

Regards,
Stefan

###

Remember to run mysql_upgrade (with the optional --datadir=3D<dbdir> flag)
the first time you start the MySQL server after an upgrade from an
earlier version.
